settings.title: What's included
settings.content: The coordinates ring and the matching cuff bracelet — each carries your full coordinates on a single engraved line. Ring sizing (see the size chart), cuff adjustment, and care details go here.

settings.title: How engraving works
settings.content: 1. Enter your coordinates once (or tap “Find my coordinates”) — the same line is engraved around the ring band and along the cuff. 2. Want different places on each piece? Open “Customize each piece separately.” 3. We send a photo proof of both pieces before the set ships.

settings.atc_label: Add to cart — free engraving on every piece
